title: View Current AUV/AGV Status In The Overall System AGV Status Pop-Up
summary: Use the HMI status pop-up or page labeled "Overall System AGV Status" to view detailed current AUV/AGV system status information shown by the source training segment.
when_to_use: Use when an operator or support user needs to inspect the current status details shown in the HMI status display identified in the training as the AUV status pop-up and shown on screen as "Overall System AGV Status."
not_for: Do not use this runbook to interpret the meaning of status values or indicators that are not explained in the source.
Do not use this runbook as navigation guidance for exact clicks or menu paths, because the source does not provide explicit navigation steps.
Do not use this runbook for corrective actions or recovery actions; the source only supports viewing current status information.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Open or view the status pop-up/page, confirm the correct screen title, and review the current status information displayed.

safety_notes: This source supports a view/inspection activity only.
Do not infer meanings for displayed status values or indicators unless the source explicitly explains them.

A terminology mismatch exists in the source: the transcript says "AUV status" while the on-screen title reads "Overall System AGV Status." Preserve both terms when communicating findings from this source.
access_or_tools_needed: Access to the OptiSweep HMI or training screen showing the AUV/AGV status pop-up
Overall System AGV Status pop-up or page

access_required: Access to the OptiSweep HMI or equivalent screen where the status pop-up/page can be viewed
system_preconditions: The Overall System AGV Status pop-up or page must be available to view

visual_references.description: Training video frame showing the status pop-up/page titled "Overall System AGV Status" with text indicating the page shows the current status.

steps.title: Open or view the Overall System AGV Status pop-up
steps.purpose: Access the status display referenced by the training segment.
steps.instruction: Open or navigate to the AUV status pop-up referenced in the training segment, identified on screen as "Overall System AGV Status." Use the available HMI or displayed training screen to bring this status view into view.
steps.expected_result: The status pop-up or page is visible to the user.
steps.healthy_condition: A pop-up or page matching the referenced status display is shown.
steps.failure_condition: The pop-up/page cannot be accessed or the expected status display is not visible.

actions.label: Open status pop-up/page
actions.exact_action: Open or navigate to the AUV status pop-up referenced in the training segment, identified on screen as "Overall System AGV Status."

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The page or pop-up title area showing "Overall System AGV Status."

stop_or_escalate_if: The AUV/AGV status pop-up cannot be accessed.
The expected status display cannot be brought into view.

source_evidence.value: Transcript: "AUV status. Just another pop up that shows you in details again."
OCR/artifact text: "Overall System AGV Status" and "This page will show the current status".

steps.title: Confirm the correct status view is displayed
steps.purpose: Verify that the displayed screen is the intended status page before reviewing information.
steps.instruction: Confirm that the displayed page is the status view by checking for the title text "Overall System AGV Status."
steps.expected_result: The page title matches the source-supported status view.
steps.healthy_condition: The title "Overall System AGV Status" is visible on the screen.
steps.failure_condition: The title is missing or does not match the expected status page title.

actions.label: Verify page title
actions.exact_action: Check for the title text "Overall System AGV Status."

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The title text reading "Overall System AGV Status."

stop_or_escalate_if: The expected "Overall System AGV Status" page title is not present.

steps.title: Review the detailed current status information
steps.purpose: Inspect the detailed status information the page is intended to show.
steps.instruction: Review the detailed status information shown on the pop-up or page, using the source-described purpose that it "shows you in details" and "will show the current status."
steps.expected_result: The user can see the current status information presented by the status display.
steps.healthy_condition: Detailed current status information is visible on the page.
steps.failure_condition: The page is visible but does not show readable current status details.

actions.label: Review current status details
actions.exact_action: Review the detailed status information shown on the pop-up or page.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The status information area associated with the text indicating the page shows the current status.

stop_or_escalate_if: The page does not show the expected current status information.

source_evidence.value: Transcript: "AUV status. Just another pop up that shows you in details again."
OCR/artifact text: "This page will show the current status".

steps.title: Observe the displayed status indicators or fields

steps.healthy_condition: Status details are visible and can be read directly from the display.
steps.failure_condition: Status details are unclear, unavailable, or require unsupported interpretation.

actions.label: Observe displayed status fields
actions.exact_action: Observe any status indicators, condition fields, or system-level status details shown on the screen.

success_criteria: The user is able to view the Overall System AGV Status pop-up/page.
The title "Overall System AGV Status" is visible and confirms the correct screen.
Current detailed status information can be inspected from the displayed page.
healthy_conditions: The page title matches "Overall System AGV Status."
The page shows current status information as described by the source.
failure_conditions: The AUV/AGV status pop-up cannot be accessed.
The expected "Overall System AGV Status" title is not present.
Displayed values or indicators would require unsupported interpretation beyond what the source explains.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the AUV/AGV status pop-up cannot be accessed.
Escalate if the expected "Overall System AGV Status" page title is not present.
Stop and seek clarification if interpretation of displayed status values or indicators is required but not explained in the source.
